admin.title: System control
admin.subtitle: Manage access, mail delivery, storage quotas, and audit trails.
admin.loginSubtitle: Website administrator only. User accounts cannot access this area.
admin.noPrivileges: This account does not have administrator privileges.

setup.title: Prepare your PhD Atlas
setup.subtitle: Choose the data store (SQLite, MySQL/MariaDB, PostgreSQL, or Microsoft SQL Server), create the first administrator, and connect the system mailbox. This guide disappears permanently after setup.
setup.accountDesc: Use an address you control. It will be the only account allowed into this panel initially.
setup.passwordHint: Use at least 12 characters. A password manager is recommended.
setup.securityDesc: These keys were auto-generated when the server started. They secure your sessions and encrypt stored credentials. Back them up together with your storage volume.
setup.securityRegenerateWarning: This will invalidate all active sessions and may make previously encrypted data unreadable. Create a backup first.
setup.securityRegenerated: New keys generated. All sessions have been invalidated — you will need to sign in again.
setup.storageDesc: Keep PhD Atlas locally in SQLite or connect a managed database before the workspace is created.
setup.storageHint: External connections are verified and prepared before setup finishes.
setup.mailDesc: PhD Atlas uses this mailbox for registration, verification, recovery, and system notifications.
setup.notificationMailboxHint: System alerts and the setup mail test are addressed here.
setup.reviewDesc: Confirm the selected data store, first permanent administrator identity, and system mailbox connection before creating the workspace.
setup.oneTimeNote: The setup route closes as soon as this account is created.
setup.smtpVerificationNote: Finishing verifies the SMTP connection before saving anything. If verification fails, you can correct the fields and retry safely.

database.configDesc: Choose local SQLite or a managed database. Credentials stay on this server and are never returned to the browser.
database.sqlitePathPlaceholder: Leave empty for the default storage/phd-atlas.sqlite
database.sqlitePathHint: Use an absolute .sqlite or .sqlite3 path on this server.
database.name: Database name
database.passwordSaved: Saved securely — leave blank to keep it
database.sslHint: Recommended for managed databases and connections outside this host.
database.mysql57CompatibilityHint: Use the conservative MySQL 5.7.44 SQL path. Testing confirms that the connected server is MySQL 5.7.44.
database.connectionRequired: Complete the database connection fields first.
database.testPassed: Connection verified and PhD Atlas storage is ready.
database.saved: Database configuration saved. Existing workspace data was migrated.
database.externalHint: The selected database is the durable source; this server maintains a short-lived compatible cache for application operations.
database.backupSqlDesc: Workspace backups include a restore-ready SQL archive for the selected engine and uploaded files.

admin.privacyNote: Admin sees metadata only. Application checklists and personal dossier content stay private.
admin.notificationPublisherDesc: Send in-app updates or email-backed announcements to selected users, saved groups, or system audiences.
admin.systemMailDesc: Configure SMTP for account, verification, reset, and quota notifications.
admin.teamCreated: Team created. Generate its institution-admin credential next.
admin.teamAwaitingOwnerDescription: No institution administrator has claimed this team yet.
admin.teamAccountsDescription: Manage organization containers separately from each member's personal account.
admin.noTeamAccountsDescription: Team accounts will appear here without replacing their owners' personal accounts.
admin.noTeamsMatch: Adjust the search text to show more organizations.
admin.logDesc: Review audit events and export logs for retention.
admin.searchUsersPlaceholder: Search name, email, role, status, or storage...
admin.noUsersMatch: Adjust the search text to show more accounts.
admin.currentUserProtected: You cannot change your own admin access here.
admin.noLogEntriesDesc: Audit events will appear here after administrator or system activity.
admin.noMatchingLogsDesc: Adjust the search text or filters to broaden the table results.
admin.logSearchPlaceholder: Search event, scope, actor, or metadata...
admin.clearLogsMessage: This removes the current retained log history. A new audit record will note that logs were cleared.
admin.changePasswordDesc: Update the administrator password. Choose a strong, unique password.
admin.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
admin.encryptionAtRestDesc: Encrypt stored application data, secrets, and optionally the SQLite file on disk.
admin.encryptionMethodDesc: Algorithm used to seal secrets and application payloads.
admin.encryptionPasswordToggleDesc: The admin-defined password participates in key derivation. Password or algorithm changes atomically re-encrypt all protected data; the server environment key remains the root secret.
admin.encryptionCurrentPasswordHint: Required when changing cipher, password, or SQLite file encryption while protection is on.
admin.encryptionApplied: Encryption settings updated. Existing data was re-sealed with the new configuration.
admin.sqliteEncryptionDesc: Run SQLite in memory and keep only an authenticated .sqlite.sealed file on disk. Plain SQLite, WAL, and SHM files are removed after a successful seal.
admin.sqliteEncryptionHint: Migration writes and authenticates a temporary seal before replacement, so an interrupted operation can resume from the last complete snapshot.
admin.externalDatabaseEncryptionDesc: An external database is active, so SQLite file encryption does not apply. At-rest encryption seals the complete workspace state and sensitive fields before they reach the external database.
admin.loginSessionDesc: Admin tokens use a sliding window and renew after successful admin activity.
admin.backupFrequencyDesc: How often the system creates automatic workspace backups.
admin.workspaceBackupsDesc: Full-system archives that include the active database backup and uploaded attachments. Download a copy before deleting anything important.
admin.noWorkspaceBackupsDesc: Create a backup now to package the active database and uploaded files into a restorable archive.
admin.systemInfoDesc: View system version, resource usage, and apply updates.
admin.systemUpdateDesc: Check public GitHub Releases automatically or upload a trusted update package manually.
admin.autoUpdateDesc: Check the public GitHub Releases feed and install an available release automatically.
admin.updateUpToDate: PhD Atlas is up to date.
admin.updateRestarting: Update installed. PhD Atlas is restarting…
admin.updateStoredNoRestart: Update installed, but automatic restart is disabled. Restart PhD Atlas manually to finish.
admin.manualUpdateDesc: Upload a trusted PhD Atlas update package when automatic release checks are unavailable.
admin.updateUploaded: Upgrade package uploaded. The update will be applied after validation.
admin.dropPackageHint: Choose or drag one .tar.gz or .tgz package · 100 MB maximum.
admin.buildUpdatePackageHint: Generate a package with npm run build:update-package, then upload the .tar.gz file here.
